question: Based on the visible part of the cost trend chart, which statement is best supported by the data shown?

options.A: The chart clearly shows which year has the highest cost.
options.B: The chart does not allow identification of the highest-cost year because some values extend beyond the visible range.
options.D: The cost in 2018 and 2020 is the same.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bars to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
